validation_gaps: Full backend unit suite and frontend checks were not rerun as part of this focused review pass; targeted service tests and ./scripts/preflight.sh were run after the blocking fixes.
QA persistence coverage would still benefit from an end-to-end middleware-to-storage fixture that decompresses captured bytes and asserts secret redaction at rest.

resolved_findings.description: Responses-to-ChatCompletions streaming treated upstream data: [DONE] without a Responses terminal event as an error, which could mark otherwise complete compatible streams as failed.
resolved_findings.resolution: Changed [DONE] handling to finalize the downstream stream normally and added TestForwardAsChatCompletions_DoneSentinelWithoutTerminalFinalizesStream.

resolved_findings.description: Raw chat-completions SSE framing needed a regression guard to ensure blank-line event separators remain preserved for strict SSE clients.
resolved_findings.resolution: Added TestForwardAsRawChatCompletions_PreservesSSEBlankLineFraming to lock the current byte-framing behavior.

resolved_findings.description: The upstream merge skill originally listed backend Go commands without the backend module context.
resolved_findings.resolution: Changed Go commands to use go -C backend for generate and test steps.
